compatible_devices.notes: 16 NEMA 6-15 outlets at 240V/5A max each (~1200W per outlet); 4 banks of 4 with 30-sec staggered start; 80A total max ballast load; requires 100A main supply; two 120V trigger cords (each controls 8 lights independently); external timer or controller required per trigger cord; on/off relay only — no dimming; North American NEMA 6-15 standard

compatible_devices.compatible_brand: Universal (any LED brand with 240V NEMA 6-15 plug)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off relay switching only; no dimming protocol support (no 0-10V, PWM, digital); LED driver must have 240V NEMA 6-15 plug; dual triggers allow two independently scheduled LED zones of 8 lights each; not primary intended use
